feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Another version of me
entry.summary:
Author: Rizzoto089

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,015Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 0

Summary: What does Eddie do when he realises Buck's been dating a man identical to him? Is he too late, does he realise his feelings, does he finally take Buck as his? smut will probably occur later in the story, it's just slow and short rn He was so similar, yet so different. They were both so earnest, so kind and playful. But he’s a good cook, he’s rough and impatient in bed, so different to how Buck imagined Eddie to be, knew Eddie to be, from all his own personal knowledge of the sex life of his best friend. And they stared at him with the same genuine, breath catching pools of brown eyes. Umber at night, and a chocolate in the day, always sparkling, always earnest, and always drowning Buck in their sincerity, until he cannot breath unless he grasps at him for air. Eddie, his Eddie. His family, until he’s in another state. His best friend until he’s not. Until these feelings get named and brought to light. His Eddie that’s never really his, never will be, not in reality at least.   ‘Hey Ian’ Buck replies with a little turn of his head, voice low and flirtatious, ‘do you wanna, maybe, exchange numbers before we eat?’

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Forgive Me, Father
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,297Chapters: 2/30Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck only means to go to confession once. Instead, he finds himself returning to the same church again and again for reasons that have absolutely nothing to do with religion and everything to do with one devastatingly kind priest named Eddie Diaz. What starts as awkward conversations and accidental emotional vulnerability slowly becomes something far more dangerous: feelings. Unfortunately for Buck, falling for a priest is a terrible idea. Even more unfortunate? It might not just be him.

entry.title: Drifting Away
entry.summary:
Author: Spacers24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,585Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 479

Summary: Eddie saw the patient lying on the street, blood all around them. There's a few produce lying around and some broken beer can, looks like the patient was just done with grocery shopping when they got hit. It's only when he gets closer that he recognizes who the patient is.    His blood turns cold as he sees a broken and bloodied Buck lying on the ground.    “BUCK!!”  ===========Caught in an accident on his day off, Buck slips into a deep coma. The 118 is left reeling as Buck's life hangs in the balance, can they pull themselves together and will Buck ever wake up?

entry.title: Moonlight Meows, Starlight Howls
entry.summary:
Author: alittlesplashofcolour

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,246Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Eddie’s jealousy and possessiveness shines through while Buck is obliviously delighted to have his best friend, partner and love of his life back at the 118 after a ridiculous stint at dispatch.Or: Buck is a joyful menace. Eddie is jealous (and very much in love).

entry.title: What a night to forget.
entry.summary:
Author: Absolute_Maniac

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,217Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 401

Summary: “Hey, can you see my phone anywhere?” he asked. Eddie started looking around the bed and then stretched himself to his side of the bed and pulled it from the nightstand.“Here.” He tossed it to him, and Buck immediately started looking through recent pictures on his phone. Pictures of them partying, a video of Eddie taking a shot, and another video of Eddie dancing.Then he came across the next picture and felt as if someone had thrown a bucket of ice water over his head. They must have asked someone else to take the picture because it was taken from at least a two-meter distance. The two of them were holding out a piece of paper towards the camera… and they were pressed together in a passionate kiss.Buck looked up from the picture when Eddie made a strangled sound on the other side of the room. “You might want to see this…” He reached over with a piece of paper in his hand. Buck took it and turned his phone over to him in return. Eddie bit into his fist as he studied the picture. Buck looked down at the paper in his hand and turned it over to the right side. It was a copy of a marriage license for Mr. Evan Buckley-Diaz and Mr. Edmundo Buckley-Diaz.

entry.title: Laws of Motion
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,660Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: "I don't wanna go out there by myself," Buck whines. "What if there's a mountain lion? Or coyotes?""You're considerably bigger than both of those things.""What if they gang up on me, Eddie?""They're not going to.""Please don't make me go alone."Or, it's dangerous to leave your tent in the middle of the night, you might come back with a boyfriend and some unexpected insights into your sexual preferences.

entry.title: Eight Years of Almost (And The Year it Finally Stuck)
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,743Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 54

Summary: It starts as a mistake. A joke. Something that doesn’t mean anything. Eddie’s birthday ends.A midnight kiss.Buck’s birthday begins. They do it every year.Over.And over.And over. For nine years.Every year.The same person. Some years are easy.Some are messy.And some… shouldn’t have happened.

entry.title: Father’s Day
entry.summary:
Author: Second_starr

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,335Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 101

Summary: Buck helps Theo out of his truck, crouching down to zip up his hoodie properly. Theo leans into the touch for a second. Then Buck notices the paper banner hanging across the front entrance. Father’s Day Breakfast! Theo sees it too. And stills beside him. “Oh,” Buck says softly. Theo’s eyes drop immediately to the ground. His curls falling in front of his face. “I forgot.” OR It’s Theo’s first father’s day without Connor and Kameron. Buck tries to navigate this to the best of his abilities.

entry.title: Alone In The Crowd.
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 758Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 97

Summary: Buck went pale. “No, seriously.” Eddie looked at him now, hurt bleeding through every word. “How long?” “How long before you realised I was gone?” The silence that followed felt suffocating. Buck opened his mouth once. Closed it again. And that—that was answer enough.

entry.title: I’ll Keep You Safe
entry.summary:
Author: mynameismery

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,453Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 59

Summary: Eddie managed to open his eyes again. His face was clammy and pale. His eyes, once so bright and full of life, were now unfocused and tired. He weakly reached up to Buck, his hand was about to fall when Buck took it. “I’m here, I’m here,” Buck wasn’t trying to stop the tears streaming down his face anymore. He could feel Eddie’s breath getting slower under his hand, he could feel the hot blood seeping through his fingers no matter how hard he tried to stop it. Eddie was fading right in front of him and there was nothing he could do.   Or Buck and Eddie are stuck in the elevator after Eddie gets shot. Buck is trying to keep him alive. (HOW THE ELEVATOR SCENE SHOULD HAVE GONE NOT THAT CRAP WE GOT) OR Short Buddie prompts that people asked me to write on tumblr. (Give me a sentence and I’ll write the next five. Except they end up being five paragraphs or so instead)

entry.title: hand me down
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,789Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 492

Summary: From behind his back, Chris reveals his old, ratty Superman logo shirt. It’s way too small for him now, but, for some reason, he’s never thrown it away. “This shirt has superpowers,” he whispers to Theo. "It keeps all the bad dreams away. It doesn’t fit me anymore, but I don’t want all the superpowers to go to waste. Do you think maybe you could look after it for me?”  Theo nods emphatically. “Yes,” he whispers. He looks up at him, his tiny face sure and determined. “I can do it, Chris.”    Or, Theo has nightmares. Chris works a hand-me-down shirt-shaped miracle.

entry.title: Ringing in the dark
entry.summary:
Author: Liley_afterdark

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,263Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 78

Summary: A small, disoriented sound slipping out of him. Relief hits Eddie so hard it almost knocks the breath out of him. “Yeah, that’s it,” he murmurs, softer now. “C’mon. Stay with me.” Buck’s brows knit together, face tightening like the world doesn’t make sense. “Eddie…?” he mumbles, voice rough and distant. “I’m here,” Eddie says immediately. “I got you. You’re okay.” Buck’s eyes flutter, not quite focusing. “Phone—kept—ringing…” Eddie swallows. “Hey, don’t worry about that right now. Just stay with me, alright? Focus on me.” Or Something is wrong with buck. Eddie called multiple times no answer. When he showed up at Buck's House he seen something he never wished to ever see.

entry.title: Touch me if you dare
entry.summary:
Author: Liley_afterdark

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: One second Buck is alone— The next, Eddie crashes into him hard enough to slam him back into the wall. “—Eddie?!” Buck catches him instinctively, arms wrapping around him— And that’s when everything changes. Because Eddie isn’t just stumbling. He’s falling. And Buck’s hands— His hands are suddenly wet. He looks down. Blood. “No— no, no, no—” Eddie’s breath is ragged against his shoulder, his grip tightening in Buck’s shirt like it’s the only thing keeping him conscious. “I—” Eddie chokes, voice barely there. “I didn’t—” His knees buckle. Buck tightens his hold immediately, dragging him up, pressing him back against the elevator wall. “Stay with me,” Buck says, panic cracking through every word. “Hey— hey, look at me.” Eddie’s eyes lift. Find him. Hold. fall in love in a single touch...

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Deal That Built a Family / Trust Me With Him
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,144Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 41

Summary: It's not your typical Buddie fic. Eddie becomes a father through surrogacy.He is a Nurse. He is gayHe become Friends with the Buckleys.He bonds instantly with Evan Buckley.When Chris is born, Eddie and Buck grow closer.  Only for their friendship to shatter when Buck becomes engaged,and Eddie discovers how dangerous Tommy is with Buck when things don't go his way Multiple events are happeningThat will only. Proof that they are meant to be together. As you all know, I am not a Tommy Kinard fan The story opens up 5 months into the surrogacy process

entry.title: Against Every Plan
entry.summary:
Author: Sunnyy_Meadoww

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,071Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 47

Summary: Before the lawsuit, Buck and Eddie had a relationship. One fun night left Buck with a surprise he never expected. After the grocery store fight, he was finally ready to give up and move on from the 118. Yet the night he was discussing it with his childhood best friend, he delivered a very special surprise.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 246,775Chapters: 51/?Kudos: 114

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.
